Klasse LogManager

java.lang.Object
ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.LogManager
public class LogManager extends Object
LogManager for managing application logs in the database. Provides functionality to create, retrieve, filter, and delete logs.

    Log record

    Methode
    Beschreibung

    clearAllLogs()
    Clears all logs from the database

    clearCache()
    Clear in-memory caches immediately.

    Creates a log entry with current timestamp

    Deletes a log entry by ID

    Get a single log by id (uses per-log cache)
